nodes.title: Welcome to Clearpath Counseling & Wellness
nodes.heroTitle: Your Journey to Wellness Starts Here

heroDescription.processed: We provide compassionate, evidence-based mental health care for individuals, couples, and families. Our team of licensed therapists creates a safe, supportive space where you can explore challenges, develop coping strategies, and build a more fulfilling life.

heroImage.alt: Peaceful therapy office with comfortable seating and warm natural light

ctaDescription.processed: Reaching out for help takes courage, and we honor that. Contact us for a free 15-minute phone consultation to discuss your needs and find the right therapist for you. We offer in-person and telehealth appointments with flexible evening and weekend availability.
